S.FORM: == bahat == bahat hiya' ga, mutu nha' pmhyan squ kska' na slaq ka kinlhan pagay.
S.PHON: == βaħat == βaħat ħijaʔ ɣa, mutu nħaʔ pmħjan s~ɕqu ks~ɕkaʔ na s~ɕlaq ka kinlħan paɣaj.
S.FORM: == bahat == bahat hiya' ga, mutu nha' pmhyan squ kska' na slaq ka kinlhan pagay.
S.PHON: == βaħat == βaħat ħijaʔ ɣa, mutu nħaʔ pmħjan s~ɕqu ks~ɕkaʔ na s~ɕlaq ka kinlħan paɣaj.
